title: The Eldegoss Tree
body:
# A flowering chorus tree?!
- This datapack will add a chorus tree unlike those who are usually found in the end islands, with open chorus flowers and grate height!
- On this tree, you may find the End form of Eldegoss.
- This datapack also adds **6 advancements** to the game, all centered around the End form of Eldegoss!
(*Disclaimer: you must have the Eldegoss End-form datapck for this to work as intended)
- ![Eldegoss_tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ccbee8bf83ec442eb172fdb27e8b4de3485b69c_0.webp)
________________________________________________________________________________________________
# Where to find it
- You can find this tree when traveling around the End islands!
________________________________________________________________________________________________
# A Pokemon sleeping among the branches?
- When you find the tree, make sure you look closely at the chorus flowers, as there may be an End form Eldegoss sleeping there!
- ![Eldegoss_end_sleep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d49c956b2319be54f27d7f899cedd06f37aedc1b_0.webp)
- Each tree can have between 0-5 Eldegoss.
- Eldegoss caught from trees have a higher chance to have their **hidden ability**.
- The Eldegoss on the tree will also have a greater chance at being **shiny**!
- Around the tree you can find Gossifluer with a slightly to mostly filled Blossom rate gauge.
